param.name: source
param.label: CARD database source
param.option: Use a database installed by the administrator

param.name: cached_card
param.label: CARD database
param.help: Select a pre-installed CARD release. Contact your Galaxy administrator if none are listed.

validator.message: No CARD databases are installed. Ask your administrator to install one, or supply files from your history.

param.name: annotation_model
param.label: Annotation model type
param.help: Controls which annotation FASTA is passed to rgi load. 'Homolog models only' is sufficient for standard AMR gene identification. 'All model types' loads the extended annotation database covering protein variant, rRNA variant, knockout, and overexpression models — required when using Include other model types.

param.name: card_json
param.label: card.json
param.help: The card.json file from the CARD database. Download card-data.tar.bz2 from https://card.mcmaster.ca/download and extract card.json from the archive. For RGI main, card.json alone is sufficient for standard AMR gene detection. For RGI bwt, you must also supply an annotation FASTA below.

param.name: annotation_model
param.label: Annotation model type
param.help: Controls which annotation FASTA is passed to rgi load. 'Homolog models only' is sufficient for standard AMR gene identification. 'All model types' loads the extended annotation database covering protein variant, rRNA variant, knockout, and overexpression models — required when using Include other model types.

param.name: card_annotation
param.label: CARD annotation FASTA — homolog models
param.help: card_database_v*.fasta. Generate it by running: rgi card_annotation -i card.json (after extracting card.json from card-data.tar.bz2). REQUIRED when using RGI bwt — omitting this causes a silent failure. Also required when enabling Include wildcard variants in RGI main.

param.name: card_annotation_all_models
param.label: CARD annotation FASTA — all models
param.help: card_database_v*_all.fasta. Generate it by running: rgi card_annotation -i card.json (the same command produces both the homolog-only and all-models FASTAs). REQUIRED when using RGI bwt with Include other model types — omitting this causes a silent failure.

param.name: source
param.label: WildCARD variant database
param.option: Use a database installed by the administrator

param.name: cached_wildcard
param.label: WildCARD database
param.help: Select a pre-installed WildCARD release and ensure the Card version matches. Contact your Galaxy administrator if none are listed.

validator.message: No WildCARD databases are installed. Ask your administrator to install one, or supply files from your history.

param.name: wildcard_annotation_model
param.label: WildCARD annotation model type
param.help: Controls which WildCARD annotation FASTA is passed to rgi load. 'Homolog models only' is sufficient for standard variant detection. 'All model types' loads the extended WildCARD annotation database — required when using Include other model types.

param.name: wildcard_annotation_model
param.label: WildCARD annotation model type
param.help: Controls which WildCARD annotation FASTA is passed to rgi load. 'Homolog models only' is sufficient for standard variant detection. 'All model types' loads the extended WildCARD annotation database — required when using Include other model types.

param.name: wildcard_annotation
param.label: WildCARD annotation FASTA — homolog models
param.help: wildcard_database_v*.fasta. To prepare: download card-variants.tar.bz2 from https://card.mcmaster.ca/download, extract and decompress all .gz files inside, then run: rgi wildcard_annotation --input_directory DIR --version VERSION --card_json card.json. Required to use Include wildcard variants.

param.name: wildcard_annotation_all_models
param.label: WildCARD annotation FASTA — all models
param.help: wildcard_database_v*_all.fasta. To prepare: download card-variants.tar.bz2 from https://card.mcmaster.ca/download, extract and decompress all .gz files inside, then run: rgi wildcard_annotation --input_directory DIR --version VERSION --card_json card.json. Both FASTAs (homolog-only and all-models) are produced by the same command. Required when combining Include wildcard variants with Include other model types.

param.name: wildcard_index
param.label: WildCARD index file
param.help: index-for-model-sequences.txt from the WildCARD archive. Extract card-variants.tar.bz2 and decompress index-for-model-sequences.txt.gz from inside it to obtain this plain-text file.

param.name: wildcard_version
param.label: WildCARD version string
param.help: Version of the WildCARD data being loaded, e.g. 4.0.0. Find the version number in the WildCARD release notes at https://card.mcmaster.ca/download — it corresponds to the card-variants.tar.bz2 archive you downloaded.

validator.message: Version should be digits and dots only, e.g. 4.0.0

macros.token: #if str($card_source.source) == "cached" #set $card_json_path = str($card_source.cached_card.fields.card_json) #set $card_annotation = str($card_source.cached_card.fields.card_annotation) #set $card_annotation_all_models = str($card_source.cached_card.fields.card_annotation_all_models) #set $annotation_model = str($card_source.annotation_model) #else #set $card_json_path = str($card_source.card_json) #set $annotation_model = str($card_source.card_annot.annotation_model) #if str($annotation_model) == "homolog" #if $card_source.card_annot.card_annotation #set $card_annotation = str($card_source.card_annot.card_annotation) #else #set $card_annotation = "" #end if #set $card_annotation_all_models = "" #else #set $card_annotation = "" #if $card_source.card_annot.card_annotation_all_models #set $card_annotation_all_models = str($card_source.card_annot.card_annotation_all_models) #else #set $card_annotation_all_models = "" #end if #end if #end if -i '$card_json_path' #if str($annotation_model) == "homolog" #if $card_annotation.strip() --card_annotation '$card_annotation' #end if #else #if $card_annotation_all_models.strip() --card_annotation_all_models '$card_annotation_all_models' #end if #end if

#if str($wildcard_source.source) == "cached" #set $wc_model = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_annotation_model) #set $wc_annotation = str($wildcard_source.cached_wildcard.fields.wildcard_annotation) #set $wc_annotation_all = str($wildcard_source.cached_wildcard.fields.wildcard_annotation_all_models) #set $wc_index = str($wildcard_source.cached_wildcard.fields.wildcard_index) #set $wc_version = str($wildcard_source.cached_wildcard.fields.wildcard_version) #elif str($wildcard_source.source) == "history" #set $wc_model = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation_model) #if str($wc_model) == "homolog" #if $wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation #set $wc_annotation = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation) #else #set $wc_annotation = "" #end if #set $wc_annotation_all = "" #else #set $wc_annotation = "" #if $wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation_all_models #set $wc_annotation_all = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation_all_models) #else #set $wc_annotation_all = "" #end if #end if #if $wildcard_source.wildcard_index #set $wc_index = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_index) #else #set $wc_index = "" #end if #set $wc_version = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_version).strip() #end if #if str($wildcard_source.source) != "none" #if str($wc_model) == "homolog" #if $wc_annotation.strip() --wildcard_annotation '$wc_annotation' #end if #else #if $wc_annotation_all.strip() --wildcard_annotation_all_models '$wc_annotation_all' #end if #end if #if $wc_index.strip() --wildcard_index '$wc_index' #end if #if $wc_version.strip() --wildcard_version '$wc_version' #end if #end if
